scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e:tooling && npm run test:e2e:self
scripts.test:e2e:tooling: node --test tests/e2e/redaction.test.mjs tests/e2e/evidence-policy.test.mjs tests/e2e/staging-prerequisites.test.mjs tests/e2e/pr-workflow-contract.test.mjs tests/e2e/local-static-server.test.mjs tests/e2e/ux-workflow-contract.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:self: playwright test tests/e2e/harness-self-test.spec.mjs && npm run test:e2e:validate
scripts.test:e2e:staging: npm run test:e2e:tooling && cross-env E2E_AUTHENTICATED_RUN=1 playwright test tests/e2e/staging-auth-restore.spec.mjs tests/e2e/staging-fleet-integrity.spec.mjs tests/e2e/staging-tenant-isolation.spec.mjs tests/e2e/staging-offline-retry.spec.mjs && npm run test:e2e:validate
scripts.test:e2e:intentional-failure: cross-env E2E_RUN_INTENTIONAL_FAILURE=1 E2E_EVIDENCE_MODE=synthetic E2E_ALLOW_BINARY_EVIDENCE=1 playwright test tests/e2e/intentional-failure.spec.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:ux: cross-env E2E_ENVIRONMENT=local E2E_LOCAL_UX_RUN=1 E2E_EVIDENCE_MODE=safe E2E_ALLOW_BINARY_EVIDENCE=0 E2E_ARTIFACT_DIR=artifacts/e2e-ux E2E_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4173 E2E_TESTER_ROLE=usability-accessibility-responsive playwright test --config=tests/e2e/playwright.ux.config.mjs && node tests/e2e/validate-ux-artifact.mjs artifacts/e2e-ux/upload
